experiment_info.experiment_description: Optimized diffusion model with modern techniques (v-prediction, cosine schedule, Min-SNR, EMA, loss-aware sampling)
experiment_info.research_question: Reference configuration - how well do modern best practices perform for 3D medical image generation?

dataset_info.preprocessing: Percentile clip (0.5-99.5%), crop foreground, pad to cubic, resize to 32^3, normalize to [-1,1]
